tasks.name: Sum Two Numbers
tasks.description: Read two integers and print their sum.

tasks.name: Even or Odd
tasks.description: Read one integer and print EVEN if it is even, otherwise ODD.

tasks.name: Maximum of Three
tasks.description: Read three integers and print the largest value.

tasks.name: Count Vowels
tasks.description: Read one lowercase word and print number of vowels (a,e,i,o,u).

tasks.name: Factorial
tasks.description: Read n (0 <= n <= 12) and print n!.

tasks.name: Reverse Digits
tasks.description: Read a positive integer and print its digits in reverse order.

tasks.name: FizzBuzz Range
tasks.description: Print numbers 1..n, replacing multiples of 3/5 with Fizz/Buzz.

tasks.name: Array Sum
tasks.description: Read n then n integers and print their sum.

tasks.name: Second Largest
tasks.description: Read n then n integers and print second largest distinct value.

tasks.name: Palindrome Number
tasks.description: Read an integer and print YES if palindrome else NO.

tasks.name: Fix Running Sum
tasks.description: Fix the bug so the program prints sum of 1..n.

tasks.name: Fix String Length
tasks.description: Fix the code so it prints length of input line.

tasks.name: Prefix Sums
tasks.description: Read n and n numbers, output prefix sums on one line.

tasks.name: GCD and LCM
tasks.description: Read a and b, print gcd then lcm.

tasks.name: Binary Search Queries
tasks.description: Given sorted array and q queries, print YES/NO for each query.

tasks.name: Longest Word
tasks.description: Read a full line, print the longest word (first on ties).

tasks.name: Bracket Balance
tasks.description: Read a bracket string of ()[]{} and print BALANCED or NOT_BALANCED.

tasks.name: Unique Elements
tasks.description: Read n and n integers, print count of distinct values.

tasks.name: Rotate Array Right
tasks.description: Read n, k and n integers; rotate right by k and print array.

tasks.name: Anagram Check
tasks.description: Read two lowercase words and print YES if anagrams else NO.
